TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_badas, title = badas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/badas} }

S.FORM: == badas == ÁŅľŤĪÜ tingalaw ku kabi nu badas. siwkay nu babaungen badas sa, u nipaluma, taneng mukan, asu'. sabelen ku badas camelen ku titi', asu'. u heci ku kakaenen nu mita. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Śõõś£ĪŤĪÜ,(Ś≠łŚźć:Psophocarpus tetragonolobus), . The winged bean (Psophocarpus tetragonolobus), also known as the Goa bean, four-angled bean, four-cornered bean, Manila bean, Dragon bean, is a tropical legume plant native to New Guinea.
S.PHON: == badas == ** tiŇčar~…ĺaw ku kabi nu badas. siwkaj nu babauŇč…ôn badas sa, u nipar~…ĺuma, tan…ôŇč mukan, asu Ē~ °. sab…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ku badas ¶am…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ku titi Ē~ °, asu Ē~ °. u ńß…ô ¶i ku kaka…ôn…ôn nu mita. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ***,(**:psopńßo ¶arpus t…ôtragonor~…ĺobus), . tńß…ô wiŇč…ôd b…ôan (psopńßo ¶arpus t…ôtragonor~…ĺobus), ar~…ĺso known as tńß…ô goa b…ôan, four-aŇčr~…ĺ…ôd b…ôan, four- ¶orn…ôr…ôd b…ôan, manir~…ĺa b…ôan, dragon b…ôan, is a tropi ¶ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ôgum…ô pr~…ĺant nati*…ô to n…ôw guin…ôa.
S.FORM: == badas == ÁŅľŤĪÜ tingalaw ku kabi nu badas. siwkay nu babaungen badas sa, u nipaluma, taneng mukan, asu'. sabelen ku badas camelen ku titi', asu'. u heci ku kakaenen nu mita. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Śõõś£ĪŤĪÜ,(Ś≠łŚźć:Psophocarpus tetragonolobus), . The winged bean (Psophocarpus tetragonolobus), also known as the Goa bean, four-angled bean, four-cornered bean, Manila bean, Dragon bean, is a tropical legume plant native to New Guinea.
